into the facility.
77 A1700_ENTRY_TYPE_CD A1700_ENTRY_TYPE_CD A1700 Type of Entry Code CHAR 1 This data in this column identifies the type of entry - admission or reentry. 1=Admission
2=Reentry
78 A1800_ENTRD_FROM_TXT A1800_ENTRD_FROM_TXT A1800 Entered From Code CHAR 2 The data in this column identifies from where the resident was admitted. 01=Community (private home/apt.,board/care,assisted living, group home)
02=Another nursing home or swing bed
03=Acute hospital
04=Psychiatric
